title: Home loads primary scan inputs
description: Verifies the home page presents the primary inputs for starting a bibliography scan.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify a PDF selection area is displayed
Verify a references input area is displayed

title: Start paste references scan and land on results
description: Verifies a user can start a scan by pasting references and is navigated to a live results page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill sample reference lines into the references field
Submit the bibliography analysis
Verify the user lands on a results page for a newly created job
Verify job results content is displayed

title: Paste references validation blocks empty submission
description: Verifies the app prevents starting a job when the references input is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill whitespace-only content into the references field
Submit the bibliography analysis
Verify an inline validation error is visible for the references field
Verify the user remains on the home page

title: Paste references accepts multiple lines and starts scan
description: Verifies a multi-line references paste starts a scan and navigates to results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill multiple distinct reference lines into the references field
Submit the bibliography analysis
Verify the user lands on a results page for a newly created job

title: Home handles configuration missing state
description: Verifies the home page shows a configuration error state that blocks starting a live scan when required configuration is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Attempt to start a scan from the home page
Verify a configuration error is visible
Verify no navigation to a results page occurs

title: Results page route is not directly testable due to dynamic jobId
description: Ensures automated navigation only uses static routes; results page verification is covered via journeys that navigate from home after creating a job.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the home page is displayed

title: Results display loads after starting scan from paste flow
description: Verifies results dashboard renders primary content after creating a job via the paste references flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill sample reference lines into the references field
Submit the bibliography analysis
Verify job results content is displayed
Verify a citation list or feed is displayed

title: Results page supports basic scrolling through content
description: Verifies a user can scroll the results dashboard and continue to see job-related content sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill sample reference lines into the references field
Submit the bibliography analysis
Scroll down the results page
Verify additional job-related results content is displayed
